input.redacted_preview:
diff --git a/internal/query/query.go b/internal/query/query.go
--- a/internal/query/query.go
+++ b/internal/query/query.go
@@ -1 +1,6 @@
 package query
+func lookup(userInput string) {
+	exec.Command("sh", "-c", userInput).Run()
+	query := fmt.Sprintf("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '%s'", userInput)
+	db.Query(query)
+}

findings.title: Shell command can execute untrusted input
findings.recommendation: Avoid a shell and pass validated arguments directly to exec.CommandContext.

findings.title: SQL statement is built by string interpolation
findings.evidence: query := fmt.Sprintf("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '%s'", userInput)
findings.recommendation: Use a parameterized query and pass values separately.

warnings.title: Changed Go code has no matching test change
warnings.evidence: No _test.go file changed in the same package.
warnings.recommendation: Add or update focused tests for the changed behavior.

needs_human_review.title: Changed Go code has no matching test change
